# @neo-skeuo

> Neo-skeuomorphic UI monorepo. Read AGENTS.md first.

## Agent entry

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — package routing, required setup, anti-patterns, verify commands
- [docs/components.catalog.json](docs/components.catalog.json) — machine-readable components
- [docs/css.imports.md](docs/css.imports.md) — CSS entrypoints and import order
- [docs/recipes/](docs/recipes/) — minimal examples per stack
- [docs/consumer/AGENTS.md](docs/consumer/AGENTS.md) — consumer app rules

## Packages (maturity)

| Package | Maturity | README |
|---------|----------|--------|
| @neo-skeuo/tokens | Production | packages/tokens/README.md |
| @neo-skeuo/assets | Production | packages/assets/README.md |
| @neo-skeuo/web-css | Production | packages/web-css/README.md |
| @neo-skeuo/antd | Production | packages/antd/README.md |
| @neo-skeuo/react | Beta | packages/react/README.md |
| @neo-skeuo/refine | Beta | packages/refine/README.md |
| @neo-skeuo/vue | Alpha | packages/vue/README.md |
| @neo-skeuo/ant-design-vue | Alpha | packages/ant-design-vue/README.md |
| @neo-skeuo/svelte | Alpha | packages/svelte/README.md |
| @neo-skeuo/react-native | Alpha | packages/react-native/README.md |

## Storybook (canonical examples)

Primitives (NeoProvider + NeoSketchDefs): `Neo/Primitives/*`
- Actions, Form, Layout, Display, Data, Navigation, Feedback

Ant Design (NeoSkeuoAntdProvider): `Neo/Ant Design/*`
- Actions, Form, Layout, Display, Data, Grid, Feedback, Overlay, Refine
- Tier 2: Inputs, Content, Extras

Decorators: apps/storybook-web/stories/decorators.tsx

## Quick routing

- Admin + Refine → @neo-skeuo/refine + web-css (index, antd, refine)
- Ant only → @neo-skeuo/antd + web-css (index, antd)
- Custom React UI → @neo-skeuo/react + web-css/index.css + NeoSketchDefs
- Tokens only → @neo-skeuo/tokens

## Do not suggest without user request

@neo-skeuo/vue, @neo-skeuo/svelte, @neo-skeuo/react-native, @neo-skeuo/ant-design-vue (Alpha)

## Consumer apps

- docs/consumer/AGENTS.md

## External docs (published npm)

Index this repo on Context7 or your docs site so agents resolve the installed package version.
